methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $43M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 1 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 5 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: REGENT Craft
private.rationale: Same sector (Transportation), same stage (Series A), post-money $270M

data.narrative:
FleetZero is a Series A-stage transportation company founded by Steven Henderson and Mike Carter that has raised $43M to date. The relevant comp universe consists of 8 private frontier-tech peers in transportation (including REGENT Craft, Rivian, The Boring Company, Einride, and Harbinger), with no public comparables available. The fragmented nature of this sector—spanning autonomous systems, alternative propulsion, and logistics infrastructure—limits the applicability of narrow peer-based valuation.

Our analysis applies the stage-progression method, which is appropriate given the company's Series A positioning and measurable fundraising history. Using total raised ($43M) as a valuation proxy and applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical for Series A-to-next-stage progression yields an implied valuation of $86M. The peer-median approach was not applicable: while 5 transportation-sector peers exist, insufficient same-stage and adjacent-stage comparables (fewer than 3 datapoints in each filter) preclude reliable median extraction without introducing sector-wide noise.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $73M (low) to $99M (high), with a median point of $86M. This single-method triangulation carries material uncertainty around appropriate step-up multiples for frontier transportation subsectors and reflects the absence of granular peer data at identical development stages. Key variables affecting final valuation include capital efficiency metrics, technology-readiness specifics, and near-term revenue trajectory.
